rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes for port-level contracts, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds when defining range assumptions and guarantees in component types.
generic_rules: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Structure AGREE annex blocks to align with AADL component hierarchy and scope rules.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean helper declarations for range checks: eq var : bool = x >= min and x <= max.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or using subcomponent ports in type contracts.
